name: codex-habit
description: Habit Resonance Kernel — learn user habits, infer next actions, and evolve with your working style

interface.shortDescription: Learns your habits and working preferences across sessions
interface.longDescription: Captures interaction signals, builds a habit graph, detects recurring patterns, and proactively suggests next steps.
defaultPrompt: Show my habit profile and what patterns you have observed.
Based on what I have been working on, what should I do next?
Check if there are any recurring patterns in my recent sessions.
